bonusTasks.claudePrompt: I am a PM at an Indian edtech startup targeting working professionals who want to upskill in data skills. We have 80K paid users, ₹8000 average course fee, 35% month-2 retention. Help me write a 6-month product strategy: what is the vision, what are the 3 strategic bets, what OKRs would you set, and what would you explicitly NOT do? Format it as a strategy document I could present to leadership.
